title: Wanderer in the Evening
content:
Kuno Kohn sings:
    Dusty Sunday
    Lies burned to pieces.
    Charred coolness
    Mothers the land.
    Dissolute longing
    Gapes once again.
    Dreams and tears
    Stream upward.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Alfred Lichtenstein delivers a powerful performance in "Wanderer in the Evening"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
